calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-25-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES-BRENDA CRUZ KEITH ATTORNEY FOR PLAINTIFF BERIONG INVESTMENTS,LLC ALSO PRESENT RENE ACOSTA-AN AGENT. DEFENDANT OLIVA TEO, IN PRO PER, PRESENT WITH SPANISH INTERPRETER MARIANA VITURRO. JUDGE PRO TEM-RODERICK THOMPSON; CLERK-PARAM NATT; REPORTER-KAREN FARNSWORTH.

CASE SETTLED PER JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION, TERMS PUT ON THE RECORD, TERMS ARE AS FOLLOWS- JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF BERIONG INVESTMENTS LLC. AND AGAINST DEFENDANT OLIVA TELLO SUED AS TEO FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 59 WOODWARD STREET, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIF.THE RENTAL AGREEMENT IS FORFEITED. THE WRIT OF POSSESSION SHALL ISSUE IMMEDIATELY AND STAY OF EXECUTION OF THE WRIT UNTIL JULY 20,2004 ON OR BEFORE 5PM, PROVIDED DEFT. VACATES THE PREMISES. PLAINTIFF WAIVES ALL BACK RENT AND DAILY DAMAGES, IF DEFT. DOES NOT VACATE THE PREMISES AS AGREED, PLAINTIFF TO FILE AN AMENDED JUDGMENT FOR DAILY DAMAGES OF $46.67 PER DAY FROM JUNE 1,2004 TO THE DATE OF JUDGMENT AND COSTS IN THE SUM OF $184.30. EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN ATTYS FEES AND COSTS. DEFENDANT FORFEITS HER SECURITY DEPOSIT, IF ANY. IF DEFT. TIMELY VACATES AND PREPARES THE APPROPRIATE DOCUMENTS, PLTF. THRU ATTY. WILL SIGN STIPULATION THE JUDGMENT MAY BE VACATED AND SET ASIDE AND THE ACTION DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. PLTS. COUNSEL WILL NEITHER PREPARE NOR FILE THE DOCUMENTS.
